name: Mom's Fish Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend all ingredients together until smooth and creamy. Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 1 to 1 1/2 weeks.
2. Clean and prepare 3 to 4 pounds (lb.) of fish, approximately 12 to 15 inches in length, without head or tail.
3. Season the fish with black pepper, red (cayenne) pepper, and salt.
4. Brush the fish filets with the marinade.
5. Fry the fish in a small amount of olive oil over medium to medium-high heat until cooked through, turning only once.
6. Serve immediately.
